content.en:
Many of the realms in the space-time territory are ownerless, and any lord can occupy them, and they will be recognized by the lord alliance.

But if you are not a lord, you can only occupy this place, but you cannot claim to be a lord, if there are other lords who occupy this place, you must give it up, this is the rule of the lord alliance.

There are good and bad territories, some territories are born with more resources, and some territories are born with fewer resources.

The nature that Ye Tian wanted to occupy the most was the Eternal Space-Time Territory, and the value of the Eternal Time-Space Territory far exceeded the ordinary space-time territory.

For an ordinary Eternal Realm, the Eternal Space-Time Territory is a great opportunity.

For example, when the original source sea gave birth to the Eternal Consciousness Golden Sea Tree, so many eternal realm competitions, it is the Eternal Awareness Present Sea Tree that can make an ordinary territory evolve into an eternal space-time territory in a certain period of time.

In the end, the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree was taken away by the Void Sword Lord.

It's a pity that there is no extra eternal space-time territory in today's space-time territory, and the Void Beast material can improve the will and merge with the body, causing some Eternal Realm lords who are in the half-step immortal realm to break the shackles and be promoted to the immortal realm.

Now, there are still a few immortals in the Immortal Realm who don't ~ have an eternal space-time territory.

Ye Tian could snatch someone else's eternal space-time territory, but once he did so, he would become the target of everyone

"Then occupy a space-time territory with rich resources, and then slowly find a way to evolve it into an eternal space-time territory!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he began to explore the situation of the space-time territories and choose a better space-time territory.

However, the better space-time territories have been picked away by those eternal realms, and the remaining space-time territories must not be good.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Stargazing Lord's space-time territory, the Stargazing Territory.

This is a territory that the Stargazing Lord occupied a long time ago, which is not bad, and there are no other Eternal Realms that will run to pick the Stargazing Territory, otherwise it will offend him, because he has always been in a masterless state.

It wasn't until he broke through to the Eternal Realm before that he made the territory a stargazing territory.

"Endless Lord, welcome to my territory!"

The Stargazing Lord personally came forward and welcomed Ye Tian into the Stargazing Territory.

The two sat in the void in the huge palace and began to chat.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian asked: "Stargazing Lord, I'm asking for advice, there are too many realms in the space-time territory and it's endless, but it's also hundreds of millions, I want to pick a good space-time territory, but I can't get it."

The Stargazing Lord smiled and said: "Endless Lord, there are indeed not many good territories now, but a territory of great value was born, you can choose a territory that looks okay Moreover, each territory has its own characteristics, maybe it is of little value to other eternal realms, but it is of great value to some eternal realms." For example, my stargazing territory contains more kendo rules, which is suitable for practicing kendo, so I chose here. "

"Actually, I want to pick a space-time territory with more resources, or a space-time territory with great potential. Ye Tian said what he thought.

"Endless Lord, space-time territories that can give birth to a lot of resources have always been very sought-after, last time our space-time territory fell a lot of Eternal Realms, but the Lords Alliance stipulates that once the Eternal Realm falls, its territory will be inherited by its relatives, as long as a new Eternal Realm is born in tens of millions of eternal years, you can completely inherit the territory. If there is no such rule, it is possible to directly occupy a territory with abundant resources but the lord has fallen. "Stargazing Lord said.

"Forget it, that's a bit excessive!" Ye Tian waved his hand, not having such an idea.

The Stargazing Lord pondered for a while and said, "Endless Lord, there is a space-time territory that is very mysterious, and there are many resources that are born, but no one has dared to refine it into their own territory. "

"Oh, which territory?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Flesh and Bone Territory!" said the Stargazing Lord.

"Blood and Bone Territory?" Ye Tian had vaguely heard of this name, but there were too many territories in the space-time territory, and he usually practiced often, so he didn't know very well.

At this time, the Stargazing Lord introduced, "The Bloodbone Territory is famous for its sea and mountain in the space-time territory, but very few Eternal Realms have entered the Bloodbone Territory. One sea in the Bloodbone Territory refers to the Black Sea, and one mountain refers to the Purple Mountain. The Black Sea is the blood of an unknown creature, and it is likely to be comparable to the level of a Legendary Lord, or even more powerful than a Legendary Lord. The Purple Mountain, on the other hand, is the embodiment of the bones of an unknown creature. The Black Sea has given birth to the Black-scaled Beast, a creature that is an important resource for the Supreme or the ordinary Half-Step Eternal Realm. Bone Mountain, on the other hand, will produce a variety of mineral veins, all of which are very valuable. "

flower

"Then why isn't there a lord refining it into a territory?"

Ye Tian wondered.

"Because every once in a while, the Bloodbone Territory will produce a special blood-colored power, which is difficult to withstand even in the ordinary Eternal Realm, although it will not fall, it will be very painful. Moreover, the exploitation of the resources of the Black Sea and the Flesh and Bone Territory is also more troublesome. The Immortal Realm didn't look down on such a territory, and the Ordinary Eternal Realm didn't dare to refine it. Of course, the real reason is not so, after all, with such a strong territory, there must be people who are excited. "

"The real trouble is that there is an ancient black-scaled beast sleeping in the Black Sea, and the strength of the other party is afraid that it has reached the immortal realm. It is precisely because of this unknown creature of the Immortal Realm that many Eternal Realms dare not rush to exploit resources, and occasionally some half-step Eternal Realm enters the Immortal Realm to exploit resources, but they do not dare to stay too long, because the unknown blood-colored power is almost irregular. There is speculation in the Eternal Realm that if the black-scaled beast is killed, perhaps the blood-colored power will be eliminated, and this territory will return to normal. However, the Eternal Realm under the Immortal Realm Lord didn't dare to go to the trouble of that black-scaled beast at all, and the Immortal Realm Lords all had Eternal Time and Space Territory, and the Blood and Bone Territory was still far inferior to the Eternal Time and Space Territory. As a result, the issue of the Bloodbone Territory has not been resolved. "

........... 0

"Before, I had paid attention to the Bloodbone Territory, but if I think about it, the resources of the Bloodbone Territory can't improve my strength, and I still prefer the Stargazing Territory. So, I gave up the Bloodbone Territory. Endless Lord, your strength is much stronger than mine now, maybe you can try, in case you solve the problem of the black-scaled beast and solve the problem of blood power, the potential of this territory is probably very extraordinary. "

After the stargazing lord finished speaking, Ye Tian began to ponder.

I have to say that the Blood and Bone Territory does meet his requirements, but the Blood and Bone Territory is still a little troublesome and needs to be dealt with.

That black-scaled beast obviously didn't have much wisdom, and it couldn't be regarded as an Eternal Realm Lord, otherwise, it would have refined the Blood and Bone Territory by itself.

Kill such a black-scaled beast, and the Lord Alliance will not stop it.

"Just choose the Bloodbone Territory!"

Ye Tian decided on the pill. _
